stimulus:
[Bar graph: Heights of Four Active Volcanoes (in meters).]

  • Mount Etna: 3,326
  • Cotopaxi: 5,897
  • Mount Fuji: 3,776
  • Sakurajima: 1,117

A volcanologist needed to identify which of these four active volcanoes is the tallest. According to the graph, the tallest is ______
stem: Which choice most effectively uses data from the graph to complete the statement?
rationale:
Choice A is correct because the graph shows Cotopaxi at 5,897 meters, taller than the other three volcanoes listed.

Choice B is incorrect: Mount Fuji is 3,776 meters, shorter than Cotopaxi. Choice C is incorrect: Mount Etna is 3,326 meters. Choice D is incorrect: Sakurajima is only 1,117 meters, the shortest of the four.
